title: A Comparative Study of Clustering Algorithms
abstract: We compare k-means DBSCAN and hierarchical clustering on synthetic and real-world datasets across multiple evaluation metrics.
text: A Comparative Study of Clustering Algorithms We compare k-means DBSCAN and hierarchical clustering on synthetic and real-world datasets across multiple evaluation metrics.

title: Improving Language Understanding by Generative Pre-Training
abstract: We demonstrate that large gains on NLP tasks can be realized by generative pre-training of a language model on a diverse corpus.
text: Improving Language Understanding by Generative Pre-Training We demonstrate that large gains on NLP tasks can be realized by generative pre-training of a language model on a diverse corpus.

title: ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge
abstract: We present the ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge and describe the dataset and evaluation procedure.
text: ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge We present the ImageNet Large Scale Visual Recognition Challenge and describe the dataset and evaluation procedure.
